creator: tonne03@jmos.net
text:
Hello,

there's a newer tcllib version 2.0 available:

https://core.tcl-lang.org/tcllib/technote/4a474d8ae3608f1f13ef77049f334be397a18485
https://core.tcl-lang.org/tcllib/uv/tcllib-2.0.tar.xz

Version 1.21 from the ports tree doesn't load with Tcl 9 (the version checks are failing). Also from the changelog:

  "Tcllib 1.21 and older will not work with Tcl 9."

Thanks!
